arts.ttl: 'I've heard a lot' - Steve McManaman makes Trent Alexander-Arnold Liverpool contract claim
arts.sum: Liverpool are working towards Trent Alexander-Arnold's contract with Steve McManaman providing a fresh take on the situation involving Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Liverpool line-up for Nottingham Forest confirmed as Arne Slot makes nine changes
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his XI for the clash with Nottingham Forest in the Premier League with nine changes in total made

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Latest table | Top scorers | Email Barry “To lose on that day was hard to take,” said Liverpool’s head coach of his side’s surprise defeat at the hands of Forest at Anfield. “Now, looking back and seeing where they are in the league, it is not such a shock result as it felt then. They had a good game plan and made us play a poor game. We have to do better. We have to look into the details.” “We are here to compete against all of the teams and I think we are doing well, but nothing changes in our approach, which stays the same,” said the Forest boss of tonight’s opponents. “We know what we can do and how we want to do things. We know each other, our strengths and weaknesses. So let’s play the game.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal have just poached key behind-the-scenes figure from Liverpool after £118m triumph
Liverpool full squad available vs Nottingham Forest as Arne Slot forced into Darwin Nunez decision
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez started for Liverpool at Anfield against Accrington Stanley in their FA Cup third round tie but will not play in the Premier League away to Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Mo Salah and Co face their toughest test this season against third place Forest
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Nottingham Forest host Liverpool at the City Ground in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp gives his verdict on Mohamed Salah's Liverpool contract stand-off as he hails his former star during controversial new role unveiling
arts.sum: Salah is one of three high-profile players out of contract at Anfield this summer, with Trent Alexander-Arnold and captain Virgil van Dijk also seeing their deals expire at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp on Man City charges and Liverpool being awarded titles - 'I buy the beer!'
arts.sum: Liverpool were twice narrowly beaten in the race for the Premier League crown by Manchester City but it has been claimed that they could be stripped of their titles amid an ongoing legal battle

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Darwin Núñez playing for Liverpool today against Nottingham Forest in the Premier League?
arts.sum: Tuesday’s Premier League game between Nottingham Forest and Liverpool is an expected top-of-the-table clash, with Nuno Espírito Santo’s team having the opportunity to move to within three points of the league leaders with a victory at the City Ground. Premier League rules state that players who receive five yellow cards at any point in their first 19 games are given a one-match suspension .

arts.ttl: Spanish press warn Arsenal not to make the same mistake as Liverpool in move for Martin Zubimendi
